items.title: 🚀 [𝐇𝐀 𝐍𝐎𝐈] 𝐌𝐈𝐃𝐃𝐋𝐄 𝐄𝐌𝐁𝐄𝐃𝐃𝐄𝐃 𝐃𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐋𝐎𝐏𝐄𝐑 (𝐂/𝐂++)
items.description:
Bạn có từ 3+ năm kinh nghiệm phát triển Embedded Software và mong muốn tham gia các dự án IoT, Embedded Systems? Đây là cơ hội dành cho bạn!

**🔎 Yêu cầu**
- Từ 3 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển Embedded Software bằng C/C++.
- Thành thạo vi điều khiển STM32, Renesas, NXP, ESP32 hoặc tương đương.
- Có kinh nghiệm với RTOS (FreeRTOS, Zephyr...) hoặc Embedded Linux.
- Hiểu và làm việc với các giao thức UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, TCP/IP, MQTT.
- Có kinh nghiệm phát triển sản phẩm IoT từ firmware đến tích hợp thiết bị.
- Có khả năng đọc schematic, datasheet và phối hợp debug giữa Hardware & Firmware.
- Thành thạo Git và quy trình phát triển phần mềm.
- Tiếng Anh đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật; kinh nghiệm làm dự án với khách hàng Nhật là một lợi thế.

**🌟 Bạn sẽ có cơ hội**
- Tham gia phát triển các sản phẩm Embedded/IoT hiện đại.
- Làm việc với đội ngũ kỹ sư giàu kinh nghiệm.
- Tiếp cận các dự án quốc tế và công nghệ mới.
- Môi trường chuyên nghiệp, nhiều cơ hội học hỏi và phát triển.

===
Ứng tuyển ngay!
💌 Email: linh.tran@dikshatek.vn
📞 Phone/Zalo: 0817 377 143 (Ms. Linh)

items.title: Middle Automation Test Engineer (Java)
items.description:
📍 Địa điểm: Liễu Giai, Hà Nội (Onsite)
💰 Thu nhập: Up to 22M NET
📄 Hợp đồng: 3 tháng (đánh giá hiệu suất để gia hạn)
🕘 Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 - Thứ 6 | Giờ hành chính
🚀 Bắt đầu: ASAP

Mô tả công việc

- Thiết kế, xây dựng và thực thi các test case/test script cho Web Application.
- Phát triển và duy trì các kịch bản Automation Test bằng Java.
- Thực hiện Functional, Regression và UI Testing.
- Phát hiện, ghi nhận và theo dõi lỗi trên Jira/Redmine.
- Phân tích kết quả kiểm thử, đề xuất cải tiến nhằm nâng cao chất lượng sản phẩm.
- Phối hợp với BA, Developer và các bên liên quan để đảm bảo chất lượng phần mềm.

Yêu cầu

- Từ 3 năm kinh nghiệm Automation Testing.
- Có ít nhất 3 năm kiểm thử Web.
- Thành thạo Java để phát triển Automation Test.
- Có kinh nghiệm với Playwright, Selenium hoặc công cụ Automation tương đương.
- Sử dụng JUnit5 hoặc framework test tương tự.
- Hiểu quy trình phát triển phần mềm (SDLC).
- Có kiến thức về JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML.
- Thành thạo Jira hoặc Redmine.
- Tiếng Anh đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật.
--

items.title: 📢 [HÀ NỘI] Junior QC Game Engineer
items.description:
- **Địa điểm:** Phường Đại Mỗ, Thành phố Hà Nội
---
**Mô tả công việc (Responsibilities)**

- Thực hiện QC cho SDK và nền tảng phát hành game dựa trên các kịch bản kiểm thử (Test Scenario) được cung cấp.
- Kiểm thử việc tích hợp (Integration) SDK vào dự án game để xác minh tính năng, khả năng tương thích và tính ổn định.
- Thực hiện kiểm thử Build Verification và Compatibility Test đối với SDK trên môi trường PC (Unity/Unreal) và Mobile.
- Kiểm thử các chức năng đăng nhập, xác thực tài khoản, thanh toán và kết nối API.
- Thực hiện Functional Test, Regression Test, Smoke Test và xác minh lại các lỗi sau khi được khắc phục.
- Kiểm thử trên nhiều thiết bị, hệ điều hành và môi trường mạng khác nhau; tái hiện, theo dõi và quản lý lỗi phát sinh.
- Lập Test Report, Bug Report; ghi nhận và chia sẻ kết quả kiểm thử với các bên liên quan trong dự án.
- Thực hiện Cross Validation nhằm đánh giá ảnh hưởng của các tính năng SDK mới đối với các chức năng hiện có.
- Kiểm thử giao diện UI/UX và chức năng trên web và ứng dụng.
- Phối hợp với đội ngũ phát triển và PM để quản lý rủi ro chất lượng trước khi phát hành (Release).

**Yêu cầu (Requirements)**

- Có tối thiểu 1,5+ năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí liên quan.
- Có hiểu biết về quy trình kiểm thử phần mềm như Functional Test, Regression Test và các quy trình kiểm thử cơ bản.
- Có kinh nghiệm kiểm thử trên các nền tảng: PC, Mobile hoặc Console.
- Có hiểu biết cơ bản về môi trường Windows, Android và iOS.
- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ quản lý lỗi và cộng tác như Jira, Confluence, TestRail, Redmine,...
- Có khả năng phân tích và phân loại lỗi theo mức độ ưu tiên (Priority) và mức độ nghiêm trọng (Severity).
- Có khả năng sử dụng tiếng Anh để đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật và trao đổi công việc với QA Leader và đội ngũ phát triển. 
- Có tư duy logic, cẩn thận và khả năng phân tích, tái hiện lỗi tốt.

**Ưu tiên (Preferred Qualifications)**

- Có kinh nghiệm kiểm thử game hoặc SDK.
- Có hiểu biết về Unity, Unreal Engine hoặc các nền tảng phát hành game.
- Có kinh nghiệm về SDK Integration, API Validation và Build Verification.
- Có kinh nghiệm phân tích lỗi bằng Android Logcat, iOS Console, Unity Log hoặc Unreal Log.
- Có kinh nghiệm kiểm thử REST API (Postman hoặc công cụ tương đương).
- Có kinh nghiệm kiểm thử trên nhiều dòng thiết bị Android/iOS của các nhà sản xuất khác nhau.
- Có kinh nghiệm QA/QC trong quá trình phát hành (Release) game hoặc ứng dụng.
---
Liên hệ mình để trao đổi chi tiết hơn nha:
💌Email: linh.tran@dikshatek.vn
📞Phone/Zalo: 0817 377 143 (Ms. Linh)

items.title: 📢 [HCM] BUSINESS ANALYST (Banking/Payment Domain) - UP TO 30M
items.description:
- Địa điểm: Quận 3 hoặc Tân Bình, TP.HCM
- Range lương: up to 30M
---
**MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC**
- Chịu trách nhiệm phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, phối hợp với đội kĩ thuật để thống nhất phạm vi, luồng xử lý, quy tắc nghiệp vụ, yêu cầu chức năng/phi chức năng và các điểm tích hợp hệ thống. Xây dựng, cập nhật tài liệu theo yêu cầu. Phối hợp với các bên liên quan để quản lý thay đổi yêu cầu, đánh giá tác động đến phạm vi, chất lượng.
- Thu thập, phân tích và xác nhận yêu cầu từ các đơn vị nghiệp vụ.
- Chuyển đổi yêu cầu nghiệp vụ thành tài liệu đặc tả chức năng, yêu cầu hệ thống.
- Phối hợp với TA/SA để phân tích, thiết kế và xây dựng giải pháp, nền tảng hệ thống ứng dụng KHDN.
- Chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng các tài liệu theo phân công:
                 + Software Requirements Specification (SRS)
                 + Architecture Design
                 + Detail Design Document
                 + Quản lý các phiên bản cập nhật (nếu có)
- Phối hợp với Nghiệp vụ, Team UI/UX và QC để đảm bảo giải pháp đáp ứng đúng yêu cầu.
- Đảm bảo tính đầy đủ, nhất quán và khả thi của yêu cầu trong suốt vòng đời dự án.
- Hỗ trợ xây dựng quy trình nghiệp vụ, wireframe, luồng xử lý và tiêu chí nghiệm thu.
- Hỗ trợ UAT, quản lý thay đổi yêu cầu và theo dõi tiến độ thực hiện.

**YÊU CẦU**
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Toán Tin, Tài Chính – Ngân hàng.
- Có ít nhất 03 năm kinh nghiệm trong phát triển phần mềm.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm domain Banking, hoặc đã từng triển khai hệ thống Notification (quản lý luồng đăng ký nhận thông báo, quản lý template, và cơ chế gửi notification dựa trên template.)
- Có kinh nghiệm tổ chức đội dự án theo mô hình Agile/Scrum Master là một lợi thế.
- Có kinh nghiệm/am hiểu hoặc khả năng tiếp cận tốt các framework, các best practice đang được sử dụng phổ biến trong lĩnh vực phần mềm.
- Có kinh nghiệm về phân tích và triển khai tích hợp hệ thống phần mềm.
- Có kinh nghiệm về tích hợp hệ thống, giao diện kết nối với hệ thống bên ngoài, phát triển ứng dụng trên nền tảng middleware, làm việc về kho dữ liệu, khai thác dữ liệu.
- Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế và phát triển phần mềm ứng dụng.
- Có kiến thức về kiến trúc SOA, BPM, Cloud, Microservice.
- Có kiến thức về nghiệp vụ, các hệ thống ứng dụng Ngân hàng, Core Banking T24.
- Có khả năng giao tiếp bằng Tiếng Anh.

**Yêu cầu ưu tiên** 
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có một trong những chứng chỉ sau:
              + PSPO I (Professional Scrum Product Owner I)
              + CCBA (Certification of Capability in Business Analysis)
              + CBAP (Certified Business Analysis Professional)
              + PMI-PBA (Professional in Business Analysis)
- Tính cách sôi nổi, hòa đồng, quyết liệt trong công việc
---
Liên hệ em để trao đổi chi tiết hơn nha:
💌Email: [linh.tran@dikshatek.vn](mailto:linh.tran@dikshatek.vn)
📞Phone/Zalo: 0817 377 143 (Ms. Linh)

items.title: VinMotion - Robotics System Engineer - Junior/Senior/Expert - Onsite/Hanoi - FTE
items.description:
**Department: Application Deployment
Location: Gia Lam, Ha Noi
Reports to: Head of System integration.**

**Job Summary:**

As a Software Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and implementing solutions for SLAM programs, localization, and navigation for robots …. 

**Responsibilities:
Senior:** 
- Define the overall architecture of robotic systems, including hardware, software, and communication frameworks.
- Ensure modularity and scalability in design for future upgrades and integrations
- Select appropriate computing platforms, middleware (e.g., ROS2), and networking solutions.
- Design and optimize advanced SLAM architectures (e.g., graph-based SLAM, deep learning-based SLAM).
- Lead the integration of multiple SLAM approaches (e.g., visual SLAM + LiDAR SLAM).
- Develop high-performance, scalable, and modular robotics software solutions.
- Architect real-time sensor fusion frameworks to enhance localization accuracy.
- Improve parallel computing and GPU acceleration for SLAM-related tasks.
- Mentor and guide junior engineers, conduct code reviews and technical training.
- Contribute to research and development by evaluating state-of-the-art SLAM techniques.
- Optimize robotics software for real-world deployment in harsh environments.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define long-term SLAM strategies.
- Document code and write technical reports on development progress.

**Requirements:
Common:**

- Education: Bachelor's or higher in Robotics, Computer Science, Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, or a related field.
- SLAM Knowledge: Understanding of SLAM techniques (e.g., Visual SLAM, LiDAR SLAM, Graph-Based SLAM).
- Programming: Strong proficiency in Python (and optionally C++ for performance-critical tasks).
- Linux Development: Experience with Ubuntu, Bash scripting, system administration, and debugging tools.
- Robotics Frameworks: Experience with ROS2 (Robot Operating System), Gazebo, OpenCV, PCL.
- Algorithms & Mathematics: Understanding of linear algebra, optimization, and probability theory related to SLAM.
- Version Control: Familiarity with Git, GitHub/GitLab, and CI/CD workflows
- Testing: Writing unit tests and integration tests for robotic applications.

**Senior:**

- Advanced SLAM Expertise: Deep knowledge of SLAM backends, graph optimization, sensor fusion 
- Linux System Optimization: Experience with real-time Linux kernels, networking, and system performance tuning.
- High-Performance Computing: Knowledge of multithreading, GPU acceleration (CUDA, OpenCL)
- C++ Expertise: Strong proficiency in C++ (memory management, performance optimization, templates).
- Machine Learning in SLAM: Experience with deep learning-based SLAM (e.g., DeepVO, DROID-SLAM, SuperGlue, reinforcement learning)
- Project Leadership: Ability to architect, plan, and execute complex robotics projects.
- Mentorship & Code Review: Experience mentoring junior engineers and conducting rigorous code reviews.
- Industry Experience: Familiarity with real-world robot deployments in industrial, automotive, or research settings.
- Experience: 5+ years of experience in robotics software engineering, SLAM, or autonomous systems.

**Contact:**
Homepage: https://vinmotion.net/career/software-tester-automation
Email: v.thuyntp35@vinmotion.net
Phone number (Zalo/WhatsApp): +84 336 736 258

items.title: VinMotion - Full Stack Engineer, Robotics Simulation - Onsite/Hanoi - FTE
items.description:
**Position Overview**

We are seeking a highly capable Software Developer (Fullstack) to build and optimize simulation platforms, web applications, and software infrastructure supporting humanoid robot development.

**Key Responsibilities**

- Design, develop, and maintain fullstack applications supporting humanoid robot development.
- Build web-based platforms for robot simulation, monitoring, visualization, and experiment management.
- Develop backend services and APIs for robotics workflows and simulation pipelines.
- Integrate with robotics simulation environments such as: Isaac Sim, MuJoCo
- Optimize software performance, scalability, and reliability for large-scale simulation workloads.
- Collaborate with AI and Robotics teams to translate research requirements into production-ready software solutions.
- Build tools for simulation data management, experiment tracking, and analytics.
- Improve system architecture and software engineering best practices across the robotics platform ecosystem.

**Requirements**

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Robotics, or a related field.
- Core Languages: Proficiency in C++ AND Python, Java (Hybrid architecture experience is highly preferred).
- Networking & Protocols: Strong experience in Socket Programming, specifically with UDP network bridges and WebSockets for real-time data streaming.
- Web 3D Graphics: Strong experience with React.js and modern state management libraries (e.g., Zustand, Redux, or Recoil) optimized for handling high-frequency, real-time data streaming; and WebGL, Three.js, or Python-based 3D visualization tools (e.g., Viser). Familiarity with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and/or Client-side Rendering (CSR) and optimizing server-client channels for 3D scenes.
- Robotics (Plus): Experience with MuJoCo (MJCF/XML syntax), and optionally ROS 2.
- Data & Config: Familiarity with parsing runtime configurations (YAML) and handling high-density event logging formats (JSONL).

**Contact**:
Homepage: https://vinmotion.net/career/software-tester-automation
Email: v.thuyntp35@vinmotion.net
Phone number (Zalo/WhatsApp): +84 336 736 258

items.title: VinMotion - Machine Learning Scientist (VLA) - Senior/Expert - Onsite/Hanoi - FTE
items.description:
**About the job
Overview**

We're building humanoid robots that can understand instructions, perceive the world, and perform useful physical work in real environments.

As a Senior / Staff Machine Learning Engineer, Vision-Language-Action (VLA), you will help build the intelligence stack that connects vision, language, and action. You'll design, train, and deploy multimodal robot policies that allow humanoid robots to understand natural-language commands, interpret complex scenes, and take reliable actions in industrial and logistics settings.

This is a hands-on role at the intersection of multimodal model development, robot learning, teleoperation data, simulation, and real-world deployment. A core challenge of the role is learning robust robot behavior from limited real-world teleoperation data, while using simulation and synthetic data to improve generalization and close the sim-to-real gap.

You'll work closely with Teleoperation, Simulation, RL & Controls, and Platform teams to turn embodied AI research into robot capabilities that run on physical hardware.

**Key Responsibilities**

- Design, train, and improve vision-language-action (VLA) models for humanoid robots using visual observations, language instructions, and robot state
- Build and fine-tune multimodal robot policies using RGB (and optionally depth), language, proprioception, and task history
- Improve policy robustness, instruction following, manipulation reliability, and generalization to new tasks and environments
- Work with the Teleoperation team to improve data quality, dataset curation, logging standards, and episode QA
- Develop training strategies for limited-data settings, including augmentation, pretraining, imitation learning, and offline RL where appropriate
- Use simulation and synthetic data to improve robustness and sim-to-real transfer
- Define evaluation metrics for task success, robustness, and safety, and use ablations / failure analysis to guide model improvements
- Collaborate with Platform and Controls teams to integrate policies into the on-robot inference stack under latency and memory constraints

For Senior-level hires: independently own a workstream from experimentation through deployment iteration

For Staff-level hires: help shape technical direction across policy learning, data strategy, evaluation, and sim-to-real roadmap

**Required Qualifications:

Core skill**

- Strong background in deep learning for vision, multimodal learning, sequence modeling, or robot learning
- Hands-on experience training models in PyTorch
- Strong Python engineering skills, including training pipelines, experiment management, debugging, and reproducibility

**Experience in at least one of the following:**

+ Vision-language / multimodal model training
+ Imitation learning / behavior cloning / offline reinforcement learning
+ Robot learning from demonstration, teleoperation, or real-world interaction data

**General**

- Ability to work effectively across ML, robotics, controls, hardware, and platform teams
- Experience owning technical problems end-to-end, from experimentation through evaluation and iteration
- BS / MS / PhD in Computer Science, Robotics, Electrical Engineering, or a related field — or equivalent industry experience

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Experience training policies for real robots, especially manipulation or articulated systems
- Experience working with teleoperation or demonstration data
- Experience with simulation / synthetic-data pipelines for robotics
- Familiarity with modern VLA and robot-policy approaches such as VLM-backbone policies (Pi0-, GR00T-, or OpenVLA-class), diffusion policy / flow-matching action heads, or ACT-style action chunking
- Experience deploying models under production constraints such as latency, memory, mixed precision, or on-device / on-robot inference
- Prior experience in humanoid robotics, embodied AI, robot manipulation, or applied multimodal systems
- Tech stack includes: PyTorch, ROS 2, Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab, MuJoCo, GPU training infrastructure, and on-robot inference optimization.

**Contact:**
Homepage: https://vinmotion.net/career/software-tester-automation
Email: v.thuyntp35@vinmotion.net
Phone number (Zalo/WhatsApp): +84 336 736 258

items.title: VinMotion - Software Automation Test - Onsite/Hanoi - FT
items.description:
**Job Description**

**Functional Testing**

- Develop and implement test plans to ensure the functionality, performance, and quality of robotic products.
- Analyze product requirements and technical specifications to design comprehensive test cases and testing scenarios.
- Execute testing activities, evaluate results, and prepare test reports.
- Identify, document, and track defects; collaborate with relevant stakeholders to analyze root causes and drive corrective actions.
- Validate system functionality and performance against defined requirements and quality standards.

**Test Automation**

- Develop and maintain automated testing tools and frameworks to improve testing efficiency and coverage.
- Support continuous improvement initiatives for test processes and quality assurance methodologies.

**Cross-functional Collaboration**

- Work closely with product team to ensure product quality throughout the development lifecycle.
- Coordinate with internal departments, external partners, and stakeholders to resolve quality-related issues.
- Provide quality feedback and recommendations to support product enhancements.

**Other Responsibilities**

Perform additional tasks and assignments as directed by the line manager.

**Your Skills and Experience

Education**

- Bachelor's degree or higher in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Embedded Systems, Robotics, or related fields

**Experience**

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software, robotics, electronics, or automation testing
- Experience in developing test plans and test cases based on product requirements and technical specifications
- hands-on experience in functional testing, product validation, and quality assurance processes
- Familiarity with quality management and defect tracking tools such as Jira, Confluence, or equivalent platforms
- Experience in developing automation testing solutions is a strong advantage

**Why You'll Love Working Here

Why Join Us?**

- Be part of a groundbreaking team shaping the future of robotics and AI
- Work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment with opportunities for growth
- Competitive compensation and benefits package

items.title: [HCM] Senior | Tech Lead Full Stack Software Engineer  - Full Time - Hybrid working
items.description:
## About BonBon

Backed by a major corporation, Bonbon is a funded startup in the mobility sector. We have huge market potential 

We are a small, high-trust team building product that matters for the garage and car-owner ecosystem. In our first two years we are intentionally staying small - growing from a couple of engineers to around five - and optimizing for execution speed, ownership, and product quality over headcount. This is a founding-engineer role: you will own a meaningful product area end to end and help set the technical and cultural bar for everyone who joins after you.

## Work Location

This role is based out of our Ho Chi Minh City office and follows a hybrid schedule: onsite Tuesday through Friday and remote on Mondays, unless an approved accommodation applies. We place a high value on in-person collaboration and building a strong in-office culture.

## What You Bring

- Strong fundamentals and around 6+ years of professional software development, or a clear track record of comparable ownership and impact. We weigh evidence of judgment, ownership, and speed over years and company logos.
- Experience designing and delivering highly-available, scalable cloud-based systems.
- Backend in at least one managed language such as Go, Java, Scala, C#, or similar (we build the backend in Go).
- Comfort across the front end - building product UI with a modern framework such as React / Next.js. ( Mobile experienced is a plus )
- Experience integrating AI-assisted development tools into real engineering workflows, with a habit of verifying their output.
- A strong sense of how AI can improve developer productivity, system design, and operational efficiency.
- High ownership, low ego, clear written communication, and the ability to thrive in ambiguity and shifting priorities.
- Genuine customer empathy - you understand why the product matters and let that guide tradeoffs.


Details JD: https://succulent-dewberry-6d4.notion.site/Senior-Full-Stack-Engineer-Founding-Team-38a6bc8451658171872ec2b52df6f80d?source=copy_link


### Open salary

Contact: 
- email: bonbondevvn@gmail.com 
- slack ( webuild ) : @hung.vu

items.title: Senior Software Engineer - QRM | HYBRID - INSPECTORIO
items.description:
**About the role**

- As a Senior Software Engineer at Inspectorio, you will partner with Product, Design, QA, and Customer Support to solve complex business problems and deliver customer value. You will use modern engineering practices, including AI-assisted development where appropriate, while maintaining high standards for architecture, quality, security, and operational excellence. As such, we are open to hiring a Senior Software Engineer with either strong backend expertise in Python, or fullstack experience with a frontend focus in Angular alongside Python.
- Success in this role is defined not only by technical implementation, but by the ability to frame problems effectively, evaluate trade-offs, orchestrate solutions across systems and teams, and guide projects from concept to measurable business outcomes.

**What you'll do**

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and Django. 
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions. 
- Lead problem discovery, root cause analysis, and solution framing for complex technical and business challenges.
- Translate ambiguous business requirements into well-defined technical solutions and execution plans.
- Drive decisions through data, experimentation, and rapid prototyping.
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner. 
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives. 
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements. 
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards. 
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities. 
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues. 
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in Python and Django. 
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards. 
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies.

**Qualifications**

- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and Django. 
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP. 
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture. 
- Proficient in working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar. 
- Demonstrated ability to solve ambiguous problems and translate business objectives into scalable technical solutions.
- Strong systems-thinking mindset with the ability to reason across product, technical, operational, and customer domains.
- Experience using AI-assisted development tools responsibly to improve engineering productivity, including coding, testing, debugging, documentation, and solution design, while maintaining high standards for quality, security, and maintainability.
- Proven ability to evaluate competing solutions and make sound trade-off decisions under uncertainty.
- Excellent written communication skills, including the ability to produce high-quality technical designs, implementation plans, and architectural proposals.
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery. 
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git. 
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services. 
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams. 
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes 
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. 
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal. 

NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with Angular (v18+) and modern frontend development. 
- Ability to contribute across the fullstack (backend + frontend). 

**Benefits**

Why it would be awesome to work with us

🍹 Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
🏝️ Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
💪 Project Ownership: You get to lead  the initiatives you're passionate about, professionally or socially.
🌱 Grow with us: We're invested in your personal and professional development.
🌎 Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 30+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.
🤝 Feel at home: Work closely with colleagues who value your voice, share our E.A.C.H. values, and help you be the best version of yourself.
🎉 Celebrate together: Enjoy remote and hub company and team  events that strengthen our bonds and build a fun culture.

Let's connect with me at +84395392802 for more information on hiring process and position expectation.

items.title: Senior Software Engineer - Core Service | HYBRID - INSPECTORIO
items.description:
**About the role**

As a Senior Software Engineer at Inspectorio, you will be responsible for working with cross-functional teams including product owners, designers, and quality assurance engineers to conceptualize, develop, and deploy software features that meet customer needs. Your initial focus will be on our core functionalities such as Organization & User Management, Authentication & Authorization, Billing & Subscription Management. 


**What you'll do**

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and its frameworks such as Django, FastAPI.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions.
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner.
- Utilize AI agents and AI workflows to streamline development tasks and routine operations, from ideation to developing new features and root cause analysis.
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives.
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards.
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities.
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues.
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in AI utilization.
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards.
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies.


**Qualifications**

- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and its frameworks.
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP.
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture.
- Proficient in working with both relational and non-relational databases such as PostgreSQL, ElasticSearch.
- Experience using AI assistants in the development workflow (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity).
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery.
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git.
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services.
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams.
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal.
- Experience in working with SaaS Billing systems is a plus.


**Benefits**

Why it would be awesome to work with us

🍹 Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
🏝️ Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
💪 Project Ownership: You get to lead  the initiatives you're passionate about, professionally or socially.
🌱 Grow with us: We're invested in your personal and professional development.
🌎 Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 30+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.
🤝 Feel at home: Work closely with colleagues who value your voice, share our E.A.C.H. values, and help you be the best version of yourself.
🎉 Celebrate together: Enjoy remote and hub company and team  events that strengthen our bonds and build a fun culture.

Contact me at +84 395392802 for further information.

items.title: Linagora - Senior Java Backend Developer - HN - 50M-60M - Hybrid
items.description:
**Location**: Hanoi, Vietnam

**WE NEED YOU**
Do you enjoy designing software that runs quickly and smoothly at scale?
At Twake Mail & Twake Calendar, we build open-source communication and collaboration products centered around scalability, open standards, and digital sovereignty.
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who can confidently navigate large codebases, deliver reliable and maintainable code, and quickly develop autonomy in a demanding engineering environment.
Beyond implementation, we value engineers who bring critical thinking, sound technical judgment, and real ownership to what they build, people who understand systems deeply, not just generate code from prompts.
If this sounds like you, this is perfect timing to join us!

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**
In this role, you will actively contribute to the open-source Apache James and Sabre DAV projects, as well as our Twake Mail and Twake Calendar products, by:
- ​​Helping to maintain and develop new features for these solutions.
- Adapting, customizing, and providing support for Twake Mail for new deployments
- Providing technical support to client projects using Apache James technology.

**QUALIFICATION**
• A good level of Java is required. An understanding of Scala and some knowledge of PHP are a plus.
• The candidate must be able to adapt to a demanding environment where high-quality, reliable, tested, documented, and well-structured code is expected.
• Be comfortable working with large codebases.
• Familiarity with open email standards is a plus (IMAP, SMTP, JMAP, Cal/CardDAV, OpenIDConnect, etc.).
• Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL data management tools is expected. We work with technologies such as Cassandra, PostgreSQL, S3 compatible, MongoDB, OpenSearch, RabbitMQ, Redis, and OpenLDAP.
• A good understanding of operational challenges is expected, both in terms of technical aspects (Kubernetes, Ansible, performance, etc.) and functional aspects (specific to email).
• An awareness of frontend and mobile development challenges is a plus (ReactJS/Flutter).
• Good level of English communication
Soft Skills
• Ability to communicate actively (communities, conferences).
• Results and quality-oriented, rather than rigid process-driven
• Ability to collaborate in an international and multicultural environment
• Flexibility and adaptability depending on the project
• Passion for the product and attention to detail
• Motivation to create a simple, reliable, and useful tool for users
• Proactive mindset

**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US?**
• Involved in OpenSource community you follow your digital sovereignty ideal
• Collaboration with a diverse, highly skilled international team that values knowledge-sharing and innovation
• Opportunities to attend specialist conferences
• Access to internal learning resources, refresher courses to keep your skills up to date
• Freedom of a hybrid work model that balances remote and in-office work.
• Additional health insurance with extensive coverage and employee-centric benefits; annual health check-ups
• Competitive salary package, including a 13th-month bonus and lunch allowance
• Exciting company outings, team-building activities
• Modern working space filled with natural light
• Free coffee & tea

**Contact**
Homepage: linagora.com
LinkedIn:https://www.linkedin.com/in/linagora-vietnam-48a7b1107/
Email: vnhr@linagora.com
Phone number: 0901735987 (Signal/Zalo/Whatsapp) - Ms. Minh Anh, HR

* 408 Dien Bien Phu, Vuon Lai Ward, HCM

## Salary Range 
 
* Open Salary

## Requirements 

* Strong experience into embedded Linux development
* Excellent embedded C/C++ experience
* Strong Embedded software development life cycle

## Responsibilities 

* Develop cutting edge vision based software
* Work on multiple parts of the embedded software life cycle
* Work with embedded AI on NPU/DSPs
* Migrate embedded solutions to Linux and other RTOS.
* Develop communications systems, systems on chips (SoC), cameras, sensors, and image processing

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Attractive salary
* Flat organization structure
* Lean & Agile: No unnecessary red tape.
* Quality First: We care about clean, scalable code.
* Execution Mindset: We focus on getting the job done.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects 

* Work closely with AI team to deliver Vision AI projects. 

## Contact 
* if you are interested please feel free to reach out to Giang - Senior Recruiter at giang.vu@cartrack.com. Many thanks!

items.description:
## Location 

* 408 Dien Bien Phu, Vuon Lai Ward, HCM

## Salary Range 
 
* Open Salary

## Requirements 

* Strong proficiency in one or more of the following: C, C++, C#, Go, or Rust.
* Proficiency in Python for scripting and automation.
* Experience with Airflow and complex ETL processes involving large datasets.
* Solid understanding of data architecture, database optimization, and monitoring best practices.
* Hands-on experience with Docker, Linux environments, and version control systems.

## Responsibilities 

* Design, build, and maintain data pipelines and ETL workflows using tools like Airflow.
* Develop monitoring systems to detect upstream data changes and maintain data freshness.
* Optimize relational and analytical databases for performance, including partitioning, indexing, and table design.
* Implement data quality, data lineage, and source documentation standards.
* Manage and tune analytics databases such as ClickHouse, Druid, StarRocks, or Doris.
* Work with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, or Oracle.
* Leverage distributed query tools (e.g., Spark, Trino) to support scalable data analysis.
* Build, deploy, and monitor services in Linux environments, including shell scripting and debugging.
* Create and maintain Docker images, ensuring consistent environments for development and deployment.
* Integrate data workflows with CI/CD pipelines using tools such as GitLab, GitHub, or Bitbucket.

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Attractive salary
* Flat organization structure
* Lean & Agile: No unnecessary red tape.
* Quality First: We care about clean, scalable code.
* Execution Mindset: We focus on getting the job done.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects 

* Managing terabyte-scale data lake to ClickHouse on Kubernetes
* Opportunities involving LLM Agents (LlamaIndex, LangChain, Qdrant, …)

## Contact 
* if you are interested please feel free to reach out to Giang - Senior Recruiter at giang.vu@cartrack.com. Many thanks!

items.title: Solutions Architect - B2B SaaS Product company - Open salary
items.description:
**About the role**
- The Solutions Architect is a senior, hands-on member of Inspectorio's Architecture team. This is an individual-contributor role focused on designing and delivering practical technical solutions to business problems. The Solutions Architect partners closely with the Engineering Leadership Team and Product Management to translate business strategy into well-architected, secure, and cost-effective solutions across all architectural domains: Application (including adherence to Application Security Standards), Data, Integration, Presentation, and Infrastructure.
- Working within an established architecture team, the Solutions Architect helps define, apply, and continuously improve the architectural patterns, standards, and reference architectures that optimize total cost of ownership and reduce cycle time for delivery through reuse and consistency. They are expected to be deeply current on modern engineering and AI practices - including GenAI solution design, agentic workflows, and AI-assisted software development - and to bring that expertise into Inspectorio's products and engineering process. 
- A successful candidate combines strong technical depth with sound business judgment, communicates clearly across technical and non-technical audiences, and is equally comfortable producing a strategic reference architecture and getting hands-on with a proof of concept. 

**What you'll do**
- Design end-to-end solution architectures for assigned products and initiatives, ensuring alignment with Inspectorio's target architecture, enterprise patterns, and Application Security Standards. 
- Partner with engineering teams and product managers throughout the delivery lifecycle, providing architectural guidance, design reviews, and pragmatic decision support from discovery through production. 
- Contribute to the definition, documentation, and evolution of strategic platforms, architectural patterns, and reference architectures within the architecture community. 
- Apply architecture standards and governance in practice - helping teams adopt patterns, reuse components, and make sound build-vs-buy and technology-selection decisions. 
- Design AI and GenAI solution architectures, including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), LLM gateway patterns, model selection and evaluation, vector/embedding stores, prompt and context management, and end-to-end observability and cost/token governance. 
- Architect agentic workflows and multi-agent systems - including tool/function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, orchestration, guardrails, human-in-the-loop controls, evaluation harnesses, and tracing. 
- Help define how AI coding assistants and agentic developer tooling (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI) are adopted, governed, and integrated into the SDLC to improve developer productivity, quality, and cycle time. 
- Continuously enhance the reliability, performance, scalability, and security of our products and platforms. 
- Produce clear technical documentation, architecture diagrams, and decision records (ADRs) that make designs understandable and actionable for engineering teams and stakeholders. 
- Build proofs of concept and reference implementations to de-risk new technologies and validate architectural approaches before broad adoption. 
- Act as a technical advisor and mentor to engineers and peers on architecture, modern engineering practices, and emerging technology trends. 
- Participate in the evaluation and selection of new software products, platforms, and AI tooling. 

**Qualifications**
- 6+ years of industry-relevant experience, including 4+ years as a solution, technical, or enterprise architect in a complex, ideally global, product or SaaS organization. 
- Demonstrated experience defining, designing, and implementing complex integration and distributed systems, including microservice and event-driven architectures, with an API-first mindset. 
- Proven ability to apply architecture standards and patterns practically to accelerate and enable delivery - balancing strategic intent with pragmatic execution. 
- Hands-on experience designing solutions on a major cloud platform (Google Cloud preferred; AWS or Azure acceptable), along with relevant middleware, messaging (e.g., Kafka/ESB), data, and infrastructure technologies. 
- Familiarity with technologies relevant to our products, including Python, Angular, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Google Cloud. 
- Practical experience architecting AI/GenAI solutions in production or near-production settings - RAG, LLM integration, evaluation, and the operational concerns (cost, latency, observability, safety) that come with them. 
- Working knowledge of agentic AI patterns and frameworks (e.g., agent orchestration, tool use, MCP) and the trade-offs involved in building reliable, observable agentic systems. 
- Hands-on familiarity with AI coding assistants and their role in the modern SDLC, including how to drive adoption, measure impact, and manage associated quality, security, and licensing considerations. 
- Awareness of responsible-AI and data-governance considerations, including handling of sensitive data (e.g., PII), prompt/data leakage risks, and model evaluation. 
- Excellent written and spoken English, with the ability to present ideas and concepts clearly and concisely to both technical and business audiences.

**_*This role is also open to Staff and Principal-level engineers with experience in design systems, cross-model dependencies, and platform solutions. We are particularly interested in candidates who have driven AI adoption in production environments and are ready to step up, take ownership, and grow within our organization._**

**Benefits:** 
- Remote-first environment 
- Flexible working hour, global team
- Full salary insurance 
- Premium healthcare PVI
- Unlimited days leave
- Well-being claim, lunch allowance, team building,..

items.title: Linagora - Senior Java Backend Developer - HN - 50M-60M - Hybrid
items.description:
Location: Hanoi, Vietnam

**WE NEED YOU** 
Do you enjoy designing software that runs quickly and smoothly at scale?
At Twake Mail & Twake Calendar, we build open-source communication and collaboration products centered around scalability, open standards, and digital sovereignty.
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who can confidently navigate large codebases, deliver reliable and maintainable code, and quickly develop autonomy in a demanding engineering environment. 
Beyond implementation, we value engineers who bring critical thinking, sound technical judgment, and real ownership to what they build, people who understand systems deeply, not just generate code from prompts.
If this sounds like you, this is perfect timing to join us!

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**
In this role, you will actively contribute to the open-source Apache James and Sabre DAV projects, as well as our Twake Mail and Twake Calendar products, by:
      - ​​Helping to maintain and develop new features for these solutions.
      - Adapting, customizing, and providing support for Twake Mail for new deployments
      - Providing technical support to client projects using Apache James technology.
      
**QUALIFICATION** 
    • A good level of Java is required. An understanding of Scala and some knowledge of PHP are a plus.
    • The candidate must be able to adapt to a demanding environment where high-quality, reliable, tested, documented, and well-structured code is expected.
    • Be comfortable working with large codebases.
    • Familiarity with open email standards is a plus (IMAP, SMTP, JMAP, Cal/CardDAV, OpenIDConnect, etc.).
    • Familiarity with SQL and NoSQL data management tools is expected. We work with technologies such as Cassandra, PostgreSQL, S3 compatible, MongoDB, OpenSearch, RabbitMQ, Redis, and OpenLDAP.
    • A good understanding of operational challenges is expected, both in terms of technical aspects (Kubernetes, Ansible, performance, etc.) and functional aspects (specific to email).
    • An awareness of frontend and mobile development challenges is a plus (ReactJS/Flutter).
    • Good level of English communication
_Soft Skills_
    • Ability to communicate actively (communities, conferences).
    • Results and quality-oriented, rather than rigid process-driven
    • Ability to collaborate in an international and multicultural environment
    • Flexibility and adaptability depending on the project
    • Passion for the product and attention to detail
    • Motivation to create a simple, reliable, and useful tool for users
    • Proactive mindset

**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US?**
    • Involved in OpenSource community you follow your digital sovereignty ideal
    • Collaboration with a diverse, highly skilled international team that values knowledge-sharing and innovation
    • Opportunities to attend specialist conferences
    • Access to internal learning resources, refresher courses to keep your skills up to date
    • Freedom of a hybrid work model that balances remote and in-office work.
    • Additional health insurance with extensive coverage and employee-centric benefits; annual health check-ups
    • Competitive salary package, including a 13th-month bonus and lunch allowance
    • Exciting company outings, team-building activities
    • Modern working space filled with natural light
    • Free coffee & tea

**Contact**
Homepage: linagora.com
LinkedIn:https://www.linkedin.com/in/linagora-vietnam-48a7b1107/
Email: [vnhr@linagora.com](mailto:vnhr@linagora.com)
Phone number: 0901735987 (Signal/Zalo/Whatsapp) - Ms. Minh Anh, HR
